calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Continued To Sep-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Cain for Virginia Martzell, Jeanne Meinert and Mary Kay Viramontez (Heirs). Jane Miller for and with Nancy Hall.

Ms. Miller explained the costs and need of having clean out the Decedent's apartment and the extent of services performed. The matter was continued to September 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for written consents from Mr. Cain's Clients. The matter will be taken under submission on that date provided the consents are filed. If consents are not filed by that date, an appearance will be required on that date.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Continued To Aug-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Continued To Mar-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Continued To Feb-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Continued To Sep-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Continued To Sep-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jane Miller for Nancy O'Hall. Thomas Cain for Virginia Martzell and 5 other intended Heirs.

Mr. Cain requested the matter be fully bonded, stated that he just came into the case, that he just received the maternal family tree and requested a 30 day continuance. Ms. Miller stated that she had no objection to the bond, that she had some information as to the asset but not in detail and that the estate was estimated at $300,000.00 to $400,000.00. The matter was continued to September 1, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the written objection which is due by August 27, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Continued To Aug-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
